title: Non-Stick Springform Cake Tin, 33x23x6.5 cm Cheesecake Pan with Removable Bottom, Leak-Proof Rectangular Bakeware Tray for Baking Tortes Mousse Cheesecake
features: Material: Our leak-proof rectangular bakeware is made of carbon steel. It is robust, does not deform easily, heats evenly, and conducts heat quickly, and makes your cake-making process much simpler
Size: The size of the non-stick cheesecake pan is 33x23x6.5cm/13.00x9.06x2.56 inch. This large-capacity cake pan can meet your daily baking needs

Removable Bottom: The rectangle cheesecake tin features a removable design, with spring clips on the sides that allow for quick removal of the baking pan, making it easier to remove the cake from the mold
Easy to Clean: The rectangular cake pan has a non-stick coating on its surface, allowing you to clean it quickly. Just a simple hand wash is sufficient, and it is also suit for dishwasher cleaning
Wide Application: Our springform cake pan is suitable for both households and bakeries. It can be used to make cheesecakes, ice cream cakes, and mousse
description: Product description: Non-Stick Springform Cake Tin, 33x23x6.5 cm Cheesecake Pan with Removable Bottom, Leak-Proof Rectangular Bakeware Tray for Baking Tortes Mousse Cheesecake Feature: Made of carbon steel, it is robust, heats evenly and conducts heat quickly The detachable bottom makes it easy to remove your cake from the mold The non-stick coating ensures that your cake won't stick to the baking pan Suit for making cakes, cheesecakes, ice cream cakes and mousse Specification: Material: Carbon Steel Size: 33x23x6.5 cm/13.00x9.06x2.56 inch Color:‎ Black Package Includes: 1 x Springform Cake pan
